title: Smoky Gooey Pork Back Ribs Venezuelan Stir-fry
description: This halal-friendly dish combines smoky pork back ribs with a cozy, gooey sauce that's perfect for a quick and easy dinner.
instructions: Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C). Season the pork with salt, black pepper, ancho chili powder, cumin, ground cinnamon, and fresh oregano.
Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add onions and garlic, sautéing until translucent.
Add paprika, salt, and pepper to the onion mixture. Cook for about 1 minute.
Transfer pork ribs into a baking dish. Pour sauce ingredients evenly over the meat.
Bake in the preheated oven for approximately 45 minutes or until the meat reaches an internal temperature of at least 140°F (60°C).
Reduce heat to low and stir-fry with fresh lime juice for about 5-7 minutes, ensuring that the sauce thickens slightly.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
